name: Patchwork Fluffal
name_jp: パッチワーク・ファーニマル
desc: This card is also treated as a "Frightfur" monster while face-up on the field. This card on the field can be used as a substitute for any 1 Fusion Material whose name is specifically listed on a "Frightfur" Fusion Monster, but the other Fusion Material(s) must be correct.
mnst_eff: This card is also treated as a "Frightfur" monster while face-up on the field. This card on the field can be used as a substitute for any 1 Fusion Material whose name is specifically listed on a "Frightfur" Fusion Monster, but the other Fusion Material(s) must be correct.
